title: Relocating Family - Social Connector
clientGreeting: Hi! We're relocating to the area in about 3 months and I'm so excited! I've been researching online and there are so many options. I'd love to talk with someone who really understands what makes a community special.
openingContext: A friendly family is relocating and wants to find a home in a welcoming community. They are enthusiastic and relationship-focused.
clientResponses: Absolutely! We're a pretty social family. My kids are active in sports, we love community events, and we want to be in a neighborhood where people actually know each other.
We've been to the area a few times and loved the vibe. We want somewhere that feels like a real community, not just houses. Do you know neighborhoods like that?
That sounds perfect! I'd love to set up a time to meet with you. Can you show us around some neighborhoods and introduce us to some people? That would be amazing!

clientProfile.name: Michelle Thompson
keyTraits: Enjoys the process, not just the result
painPoints: Anxiety about moving to new area

evaluationCriteria.enthusiasmMatching: Did ISA match the client's positive energy?
evaluationCriteria.communityKnowledge: Did ISA demonstrate knowledge of neighborhoods and communities?
evaluationCriteria.personalConnections: Did ISA build rapport and make personal connections?
evaluationCriteria.familyFocus: Did ISA understand and address family needs?
evaluationCriteria.resourcefulness: Did ISA offer to make introductions and connections?
evaluationCriteria.appointmentClosing: Did ISA schedule a neighborhood tour or community visit?
